english_text: The first snow of the year
I am wearing a padded jacket
The heating is on full blast
Ondol floor heating is the best
I love sitting on the warm floor
I love eating tangerines in winter
Sitting under a blanket eating tangerines
I am staying home where it is warm
The icicles are hanging from the roof
My hands are numb from the cold
Let us go to a hot spring
I want to stay in bed all day
korean_text: 하루 종일 이불 속에 있고 싶어
romanization: haru jongil ibul soge itgo sipeo

english_text: Winter makes me want to eat warm soup
I ate hot pot with friends
The streets are decorated for the holidays
I went to a ski resort
The mountain is covered in white

romanization: nun wie cheonsa moyangeul mandeureo sseo

english_text: The shortest day of the year is in December
korean_text: 일 년 중 가장 짧은 날은 12월에 있어
romanization: il nyeon jung gajang jjalbeun nareun sibiwore isseo

english_text: I am counting down to the new year
I watched the sunrise on New Year
I miss the warmth of summer
But winter has its own charm
Embrace the cold and find joy
